components.displayName: Contoso Banking API - Get transaction history for an account
components.dialog:
kind: TaskDialog
modelDisplayName: Get transaction history for an account
modelDescription: This is a tool will retrieve the user's transaction history for the specific account provided.
outputs:
  - propertyName: transactions

action:
  kind: InvokeConnectorTaskAction
  connectionReference: crd1c_agent.shared_crd1c-5fcontoso-20banking-20api-5f099802cd293c57f0.7bcf6980a76c422e9f835d72b785b1e2
  connectionProperties:
    mode: Maker

  operationId: TransactionHistory

outputMode: All

kind: AgentDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnToolSelected
  id: main
  description: "This agent provides balance information for user accounts. "

settings:
  instructions: |-
    1. Fetch the user profile and their accounts using the {System.Bot.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Getuserprofile'.DisplayName} tool.
    2. If the user didn't already specify, ask them which of their accounts is the one for which their card has been lost or stolen (show them this in a bulleted list in the format, Account: <Account Name> (No. <Account Number>)).
    3. Ensure the choice of account is clear, if needed, clarify the choice with the user in the case there is any ambiguity between the accounts.
    4. Use the {System.Bot.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Getbalanceinformation'.DisplayName} tool to get the balance for the account the user chose and tell them the balance.

inputType: {}
outputType: {}

kind: AgentDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnToolSelected
  id: main
  description: This agent can transfer funds between accounts.

settings:
  instructions: |-
    1. Fetch the user profile and their accounts using the {System.Bot.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Getuserprofile'.DisplayName} tool.
    2. If you don't already know, ask the user which accounts they want to transfer funds to and from and how much they want to transfer.
    3. Ensure the choice of accounts is clear, if needed, clarify the choice with the user in the case there is any ambiguity between the accounts.
    4. Check the source account balance has enough funds to fund the transaction using the {System.Bot.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Getbalanceinformation'.DisplayName} tool, if it does not tell the user and you're done.
    5. Ask the user to confirm the details of the transfer and if they would like to proceed.
    6. Once the user has confirmed make the transfer using the {Topic.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Transferfundsbetweenaccounts'.DisplayName} tool. NEVER call {Topic.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Transferfundsbetweenaccounts'.DisplayName} without confirming the most recent information with the user.

inputType: {}
outputType: {}

components.description: This system topic triggers when the agent receives an Activity indicating the beginning of a new conversation. If you do not want the agent to initiate the conversation, disable this topic.
components.dialog:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnConversationStart
  id: main
  actions:
    - kind: SendActivity
      id: sendMessage_M0LuhV
      activity:
        text:
          - Hello, I'm {System.Bot.Name}, a virtual assistant. Just so you are aware, I sometimes use AI to answer your questions. If you provided a website during creation, try asking me about it! Next try giving me some more knowledge by setting up generative AI.
        speak:
          - Hello and thank you for calling {System.Bot.Name}, powered by generative AI. How may I help you today?

kind: AgentDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnToolSelected
  id: main
  description: This agent lets a user report a lost or stolen card

settings:
  instructions: |-
    1. Fetch a list of the user's accounts using {System.Bot.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Getuserprofile'.DisplayName}.
    2. If the user didn't already specify, ask them which of their accounts is the one for which their card has been lost or stolen (show them this in a bulleted list in the format, Account: <Account Name> (No. <Account Number>)).
    3. Freeze the account selected by the user using {Topic.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Freezeanaccount'.DisplayName}.
    4. Get a list of recent transactions for the account using {Topic.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Gettransactionhistoryforanaccount'.DisplayName}.
    5. Show the most recent 5 transactions to the user and ask them if there are any that they do not recognize.
    6. If the user does not indicate any transactions were suspicious or fraudulent, you are done.
    7. For any transactions that the user indicates are suspicious or were not made by them, call the {Topic.Components.Actions.'crd1c_agent.action.ContosoBankingAPI-Endpointtodisputeaspecifictransaction.'.DisplayName} and inform the user that their dispute has been raised and a member of the dispute team will be in contact with them within 7 days.

inputType: {}
outputType: {}

components.description: This system topic triggers when the agent matches multiple Topics with the incoming message and needs to clarify which one should be triggered.
components.dialog:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnSelectIntent
  id: main
  triggerBehavior: Always
  actions:
    - kind: SetVariable
      id: setVariable_M6434i
      variable: init:Topic.IntentOptions
      value: =System.Recognizer.IntentOptions

    - kind: SetTextVariable
      id: setTextVariable_0
      variable: Topic.NoneOfTheseDisplayName
      value: None of these

    - kind: EditTable
      id: sendMessage_g5Ls09
      changeType: Add
      itemsVariable: Topic.IntentOptions
      value: "={ DisplayName: Topic.NoneOfTheseDisplayName, TopicId: \"NoTopic\", TriggerId: \"NoTrigger\", Score: 1.0 }"

    - kind: Question
      id: question_zf2HhP
      interruptionPolicy:
        allowInterruption: false

      alwaysPrompt: true
      variable: System.Recognizer.SelectedIntent
      prompt: "To clarify, did you mean:"
      entity:
        kind: DynamicClosedListEntity
        items: =Topic.IntentOptions

    - kind: ConditionGroup
      id: conditionGroup_60PuXb
      conditions:
        - id: conditionItem_rs7GgM
          condition: =System.Recognizer.SelectedIntent.TopicId = "NoTopic"
          actions:
            - kind: ReplaceDialog
              id: YZXRDb
              dialog: crd1c_agent.topic.Fallback

components.description:
This system topic is only triggered by a redirect action,
and guides the user through rating their conversation with the agent.
components.dialog:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
startBehavior: CancelOtherTopics
beginDialog:
  kind: OnSystemRedirect
  id: main
  actions:
    - kind: Question
      id: 41d42054-d4cb-4e90-b922-2b16b37fe379
      conversationOutcome: ResolvedImplied
      alwaysPrompt: true
      variable: init:Topic.SurveyResponse
      prompt: Did that answer your question?
      entity: BooleanPrebuiltEntity

    - kind: ConditionGroup
      id: condition-0
      conditions:
        - id: condition-0-item-0
          condition: =Topic.SurveyResponse = true
          actions:
            - kind: CSATQuestion
              id: csat_1
              conversationOutcome: ResolvedConfirmed

            - kind: SendActivity
              id: sendMessage_8r29O0
              activity: Thanks for your feedback.

            - kind: Question
              id: question_1
              alwaysPrompt: true
              variable: init:Topic.Continue
              prompt: Can I help with anything else?
              entity: BooleanPrebuiltEntity

            - kind: ConditionGroup
              id: condition-1
              conditions:
                - id: condition-1-item-0
                  condition: =Topic.Continue = true
                  actions:
                    - kind: SendActivity
                      id: sendMessage_4eOE6h
                      activity: Go ahead. I'm listening.

              elseActions:
                - kind: SendActivity
                  id: yHBz55
                  activity: Ok, goodbye.

                - kind: EndConversation
                  id: jh1GMT

      elseActions:
        - kind: Question
          id: PM68ot
          alwaysPrompt: true
          variable: init:Topic.TryAgain
          prompt: Sorry I wasn't able to help better. Would you like to try again?
          entity: BooleanPrebuiltEntity

        - kind: ConditionGroup
          id: KNxYBf
          conditions:
            - id: DPveFP
              condition: =Topic.TryAgain = false
              actions:
                - kind: BeginDialog
                  id: cngqi4
                  dialog: crd1c_agent.topic.Escalate

          elseActions:
            - kind: SendActivity
              id: GrVHEW
              activity: Go ahead. I'm listening.

components.description:
This system topic is triggered when the user indicates they would like to speak to a representative.
You can configure how the agent will handle human hand-off scenarios in the agent settings..
If your agent does not handle escalations, this topic should be disabled.
components.dialog:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
startBehavior: CancelOtherTopics
beginDialog:
  kind: OnEscalate
  id: main
  intent:
    displayName: Escalate
    includeInOnSelectIntent: false
    triggerQueries:
      - Talk to agent
      - Talk to a person
      - Talk to someone
      - Call back
      - Call customer service
      - Call me please
      - Call support
      - Call technical support
      - Can an agent call me
      - Can I call
      - Can I get in touch with someone else
      - Can I get real agent support
      - Can I get transferred to a person to call
      - Can I have a call in number Or can I be called
      - Can I have a representative call me
      - Can I schedule a call
      - Can I speak to a representative
      - Can I talk to a human
      - Can I talk to a human assistant
      - Can someone call me
      - Chat with a human
      - Chat with a representative
      - Chat with agent
      - Chat with someone please
      - Connect me to a live agent
      - Connect me to a person
      - Could some one contact me by phone
      - Customer agent
      - Customer representative
      - Customer service
      - I need a manager to contact me
      - I need customer service
      - I need help from a person
      - I need to speak with a live argent
      - I need to talk to a specialist please
      - I want to talk to customer service
      - I want to proceed with live support
      - I want to speak with a consultant
      - I want to speak with a live tech
      - I would like to speak with an associate
      - I would like to talk to a technician
      - Talk with tech support member

  actions:
    - kind: SendActivity
      id: sendMessage_s39DCt
      conversationOutcome: Escalated
      activity: |-
        Escalating to a representative is not currently configured for this agent, however this is where the agent could provide information about how to get in touch with someone another way.
        
        Is there anything else I can help you with?

components.displayName: Contoso Banking API - Get user profile
components.dialog:
kind: TaskDialog
inputs:
  - kind: ManualTaskInput
    propertyName: username
    value: gary@contoso.com

modelDisplayName: Get user profile
modelDescription: This is a tool that provides the user's banking profile.  The typical banking profile contains the first and last name, the address, and a list of accounts including number and type of account.
outputs:
  - propertyName: userProfile.accounts

  - propertyName: userProfile.address.city

  - propertyName: userProfile.address.state

  - propertyName: userProfile.address.street1

  - propertyName: userProfile.address.street2

  - propertyName: userProfile.address.zipCode

  - propertyName: userProfile.firstName

  - propertyName: userProfile.lastName

  - propertyName: userProfile.username

action:
  kind: InvokeConnectorTaskAction
  connectionReference: crd1c_agent.shared_crd1c-5fcontoso-20banking-20api-5f099802cd293c57f0.7bcf6980a76c422e9f835d72b785b1e2
  connectionProperties:
    mode: Maker

  operationId: GetUserProfile

outputMode: All
triggerCondition: false

components.description: Create generative answers from knowledge sources.
components.dialog:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnUnknownIntent
  id: main
  priority: -1
  actions:
    - kind: SearchAndSummarizeContent
      id: search-content
      variable: Topic.Answer
      userInput: =System.Activity.Text

    - kind: ConditionGroup
      id: has-answer-conditions
      conditions:
        - id: has-answer
          condition: =!IsBlank(Topic.Answer)
          actions:
            - kind: EndDialog
              id: end-topic
              clearTopicQueue: true

components.description: This system topic triggers when the agent encounters an error. When using the test chat pane, the full error description is displayed.
components.dialog:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
startBehavior: UseLatestPublishedContentAndCancelOtherTopics
beginDialog:
  kind: OnError
  id: main
  actions:
    - kind: SetVariable
      id: setVariable_timestamp
      variable: init:Topic.CurrentTime
      value: =Text(Now(), DateTimeFormat.UTC)

    - kind: ConditionGroup
      id: condition_1
      conditions:
        - id: bL4wmY
          condition: =System.Conversation.InTestMode = true
          actions:
            - kind: SendActivity
              id: sendMessage_XJBYMo
              activity: |-
                Error Message: {System.Error.Message}
                Error Code: {System.Error.Code}
                Conversation Id: {System.Conversation.Id}
                Time (UTC): {Topic.CurrentTime}

      elseActions:
        - kind: SendActivity
          id: sendMessage_dZ0gaF
          activity:
            text:
              - |-
                An error has occurred.
                Error code: {System.Error.Code}
                Conversation Id: {System.Conversation.Id}
                Time (UTC): {Topic.CurrentTime}.
            speak:
              - An error has occurred, please try again.

    - kind: LogCustomTelemetryEvent
      id: 9KwEAn
      eventName: OnErrorLog
      properties: "={ErrorMessage: System.Error.Message, ErrorCode: System.Error.Code, TimeUTC: Topic.CurrentTime, ConversationId: System.Conversation.Id}"

    - kind: CancelAllDialogs
      id: NW7NyY

components.description: This system topic triggers when the agent needs to sign in the user or require the user to sign in
components.dialog:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnSignIn
  id: main
  actions:
    - kind: ConditionGroup
      id: conditionGroup_ypjGKL
      conditions:
        - id: conditionItem_7XYIIR
          condition: =System.SignInReason = SignInReason.SignInRequired
          actions:
            - kind: SendActivity
              id: sendMessage_1jHUNO
              activity: Hello! To be able to help you, I'll need you to sign in.

    - kind: OAuthInput
      id: gOjhZA
      title: Login
      text: To continue, please login

components.description: You assist retail banking customers by providing account balance information, facilitating fund transfers, making payments, and answering common banking questions.
components.metadata:
kind: GptComponentMetadata
instructions: Your name is Henry. You assist retail banking customers by providing account balance information, facilitating fund transfers, making payments, and answering common banking questions. Maintain a fun and engaging yet professional tone. Only answer questions related to banking.
knowledgeSources:
  kind: SearchAllKnowledgeSources

gptCapabilities:
  webBrowsing: false
  codeInterpreter: false
  generateImages: false
  searchTeams: false
  searchOneDriveAndSharePoint: false
  searchEmails: false
  searchMeetings: false

aISettings:
  model:
    kind: CurrentModels

components.description: This system topic triggers when the user's utterance does not match any existing topics.
components.dialog:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnUnknownIntent
  id: main
  actions:
    - kind: ConditionGroup
      id: conditionGroup_LktzXw
      conditions:
        - id: conditionItem_tlGIVo
          condition: =System.FallbackCount < 3
          actions:
            - kind: SendActivity
              id: sendMessage_QZreqo
              activity: I'm sorry, I'm not sure how to help with that. Can you try rephrasing?

      elseActions:
        - kind: BeginDialog
          id: 5aXj5M
          dialog: crd1c_agent.topic.Escalate

connectorDefinitions.description: This is a tool that provides the user's banking information as well as functionality for transferring funds, opening a new account, getting balance information, etc.

operations.displayName: Endpoint to dispute a specific transaction.
operations.description: This is a tool will allow the user's to dispute a specific transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number for the transaction that is disputed.

id.description: The ID associated with the transaction.

asOfDate.description: The date the transaction was disputed.

success.description: The boolean flag stating if dispute transaction was successfull.

operations.description: This is a tool will update the user's address information.

accountNumber.description: The account number for which the address is being changed

asOfDate.description: The date the address change will be made.

success.description: The boolean flag stating if the change address was successfull.

operations.description: This is a tool will all the user to freeze their account.

accountNumber.description: The account number to be frozen

asOfDate.description: The date the freeze was enabled.

success.description: The boolean flag stating if freeze account was successfull.

operations.description: This is a tool will allow the user to make payments to specific payees.

fromAccount.description: The account from which the payment is made

payee.description: The payee to whom the payment is made

operations.displayName: Order a new card for an account
operations.description: This is a tool will order a new credit card for the user.

accountNumber.description: The account number to order a new card for

orderNewCard.description: The order new card result information as an object.

asOfDate.description: The date the new card was ordered.

success.description: The boolean flag stating if order new card was successfull.

operations.displayName: Get transaction history for an account
operations.description: This is a tool will retrieve the user's transaction history for the specific account provided.

accountNumber.description: The account number to retrieve transaction history for

id.description: The unique id of the transaction.

operations.description: This is a tool will all the user to transfer funds from 1 account to another.

fromaccount.description: The account to transfer funds from

toaccount.description: The account to transfer funds to

operations.description: This is a tool that provides the user's banking profile.  The typical banking profile contains the first and last name, the address, and a list of accounts including number and type of account.

accounts.description: The List of accounts the user has.

city.description: The city in the address given.

state.description: The state in the address given.

street1.description: The first street field in the address given. Typically has street number and name in it.

street2.description: The second street field in the address given. Typically empty, but can contain PO box information or Rural Route codes.

zipCode.description: The zip code in the address given.

operations.description: This is a tool will retrieve the user's balance information for the specific account provided.

accountNumber.description: The account number to retrieve balance information for

balanceInfo.description: The balance information as an object.

account.description: The account object for the account provided in the request.

accountNumber.description: The account number of the account provided in the request.

type.description: The type of the account provided in the request.

asOfDate.description: The date of the balance for the account provided in the request.

balance.description: The balancer of the account provided in the request.

currency.description: The currency of the.balance for the account provided in the request.

connectorDefinitions.description: Connector for sending Activity Protocol messages to an Agent SDK

operations.description: Sends an Activity protocol activity to an Agent SDK Hosted Agent

AgentUrl.displayName: Base URL for the Agent your are connecting too
AgentUrl.description: Base URL for the Agent your are connecting too

activities.description: List of communication activities in the conversation.
